backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (retro theme, masthead, navigation, daily issue system, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose of every component, page, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes using oklch values.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'The Daddy TGM' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Home, Reader, Archive, Soapbox, About) wrapped in a shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Full-page layout wrapper rendering the Masthead, Navigation, a main content area, and a footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Masthead.tsx: Magazine masthead component displaying 'THE DADDY TGM' in large retro serif typography with decorative striped borders, a tagline banner, and a flicker animation.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with five retro-styled links, active route highlighting, and a mobile hamburger menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/PageRenderer.tsx: Renders individual magazine pages based on content type (movie poster, comic strip, fake ad, review, letter, or back page) using retro-styled layouts and ASCII art.
frontend/src/data/contentLibrary.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and exported arrays of static content items (spoof movie posters, comic strips, fake ads, reviews, letters, back-page items) used to populate the retro magazine's pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and expose the current identity and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports retro Google Fonts, sets up a 1970s earth-tone CSS custom-property theme, and defines reusable Tailwind component classes for the newsprint-textured magazine UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a static 'About Us' page with fictional staff bios and a founding story for the satirical retro magazine 'The Daddy TGM'.
frontend/src/pages/ArchivePage.tsx: Displays a list of archived magazine issues retrieved from local storage, allowing users to navigate to any past issue in the reader view.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the magazine home page showing today's issue header, cover feature (movie poster), and teasers for the next four pages with titles, snippets, and type labels.
frontend/src/pages/ReaderPage.tsx: Full-issue reader page that generates 50 pages from a seed, supports page navigation via URL params and prev/next buttons, and renders each page through PageRenderer.
frontend/src/pages/SoapboxPage.tsx: Community soapbox page where users can post messages, like posts, and reply to them, with all data persisted to localStorage via soapboxUtils.
frontend/src/utils/issueGenerator.ts: Generates a deterministic 50-page issue from a numeric seed by shuffling the content pool with a seeded RNG and appending a back-page item as page 50.
frontend/src/utils/issueUtils.ts: Provides helpers for computing issue numbers and seeds from dates, formatting date strings, and persisting/retrieving visited issues in localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/prng.ts: Implements a seedable mulberry32 PRNG with utility methods for random numbers, Fisher-Yates shuffle, and picking random elements from arrays.
frontend/src/utils/soapboxUtils.ts: Manages soapbox posts and replies stored in localStorage, including CRUD operations, like counting, and relative timestamp formatting, with a pool of 1970s-themed fake usernames.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a 1970s retro color palette (paper, rust, mustard, avocado, etc.), custom retro font families, and standard design tokens with typography and container-query plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the full project state for 'The Daddy TGM', a retro 1970s satirical online magazine built in pure HTML/CSS/JS, documenting architecture, features, known issues, and image requirements.
